expected.subject: Cancellation received — ends 2026-06-01
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Confirming your cancellation request.

When it takes effect: 2026-06-01

Your site stays live until 2026-06-01. On that
date it goes offline, billing stops, and you will get a
final receipt by email.

Money side:
  • No refund — you keep your site running until
    2026-06-01, which is what you have already paid for.
  • The one-off setup fee is NOT refunded — that paid for
    building your site, which has already been delivered.
    Only the monthly subscription is prorated.

Changed your mind? Reply to this email any time before
2026-06-01 and I can undo it on the spot. After that
the site is offline and the account is closed.

Thank you for the run — happy to chat any time if there is
anything I can do to help.

— ModuForge
